overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a morning walk through an urban Los Santos neighborhood during golden hour. The player walks along sidewalks and crosses streets near the Puerto Del Sol waterfront area, passing palm trees, commercial buildings, and other pedestrians under clear skies.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete wall with green hedge

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with green hedge on top running along the right side of the sidewalk
elevated highway overpass structure visible in the distance
wooden utility pole with power lines
tall black street lamp with dual lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along an urban sidewalk bordered by a tall concrete wall with greenery on the right. The street runs parallel on the left with an overpass visible in the distance. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as the camera moves forward toward a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront walkway with red roof building

events.description: crosses the street at crosswalk and turns right onto a curved path
helicopter flies overhead across the blue sky

agents.ego_description: crosses the crosswalk, turns right, and follows the curved path alongside a building

notable_agents.action: black helicopter flying overhead from left to right across the sky

entered.detail: single-story building with red clay tile roof and wooden patio railing
low textured concrete wall running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the scene opens into a curved waterfront walkway. A distinctive building with a red tile roof appears on the right, and a helicopter flies overhead. The path continues with a low concrete retaining wall on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined pedestrian path approaching commercial intersection

events.description: passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm tree lined path toward a commercial area with signage

notable_agents.action: man in striped shirt walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
large yellow commercial billboard with red text reading Extreme Sightseeing
low yellow building with flat roof behind the sign
industrial smokestack emitting smoke visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path continues lined with tall palm trees on the right. The red roof building falls behind as a large yellow Extreme Sightseeing billboard comes into view. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera approaches another crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection near Puerto Del Sol canal

events.description: crosses the multi-lane street at a marked crosswalk
turns right to walk along the canal waterfront path

agents.ego_description: crosses the street at the crosswalk and turns right to walk along the canal

notable_agents.action: woman crossing the street in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: concrete-lined canal with calm water running alongside the walkway
tall multi-story white apartment complex with balconies

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street at the intersection near the Extreme Sightseeing sign, the camera turns right to reveal the Puerto Del Sol canal. The waterway runs parallel to the path on the right, with modern apartment buildings visible across the canal. Traffic moves along the road to the left as the walk continues along the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined urban sidewalk toward the open, sunlit vistas of the Puerto Del Sol waterfront. It begins by moving along a concrete wall and past an approaching pedestrian toward a distant overpass, before crossing the street to enter a curved walkway. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to reveal a red-tiled roof building and a helicopter flying overhead, eventually shifting toward a line of tall palm trees and a large yellow Extreme Sightseeing billboard. The path then leads through another intersection, where the camera turns right to uncover the Puerto Del Sol canal. Finally, the view expands to show the waterway running parallel to the path with modern apartment buildings across the canal and traffic flowing alongside the waterfront.
